title: PathGraph Aspiration Record
description: A single aspiration record in the PathGraph index. Extracted from session tracks by the Historian advisor.

id.description: Unique ID for this aspiration record. Format: aspiration-{slug}-{hex8}

source_session.description: Session ID where this aspiration was stated. Format: session-YYYYMMDD-HHMM

extracted_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this aspiration was extracted by PathGraph

module.description: Which spoke module this aspiration targets

text.description: The stated intent — verbatim quote or faithful paraphrase from track

confidence.description: explicit: Mario stated it directly. inferred: implied by pattern of decisions. contextual: suggested by adjacent tradeoffs.

status.description: open: active aspiration. fulfilled: addressed by completed lug. drifted: gap confirmed, no progress. abandoned: >30 sessions, no progress (requires human confirmation).

drift_level.description: minor: partially addressed. significant: no meaningful progress. critical: blocking other work. Null when status is not drifted.

fulfilled_session.description: Session ID where this aspiration was fulfilled. Null until fulfilled.

fulfilled_lug.description: Lug ID that fulfilled this aspiration. Null until fulfilled.

superseded_by.description: ID of aspiration record that supersedes this one. Null if not superseded.

spirit_extraction.description: Spirit metadata extracted from the source track event

mood.description: Tone and emotional signal of the originating session

implied_constraints.description: Constraints that shaped decisions in this session

tradeoffs_made.description: What was sacrificed for what in this session

core_intent.description: The underlying goal beneath the surface action

weight.description: Computed weight: recency x frequency. Updated on each PathGraph refactor pass.

mention_count.description: Number of sessions where this aspiration (or near-duplicate) was stated

related_lug_ids.description: Lug IDs related to this aspiration (partial implementations, blocked work, etc.)

tags.description: Free-form tags for grouping and filtering aspirations
